CVE-2020-35605.title: The Graphics Protocol feature in graphics.c in kitty before 0.19. ...
CVE-2020-35605.summary: The Graphics Protocol feature in graphics.c in kitty before 0.19.3 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code because a filename containing special characters can be included in an error message.

CVE-2025-43929.title: open_actions.py in kitty before 0.41.0 does not ask for user conf ...
CVE-2025-43929.summary: open_actions.py in kitty before 0.41.0 does not ask for user confirmation before running a local executable file that may have been linked from an untrusted document (e.g., a document opened in KDE ghostwriter).

CVE-2022-41322.title: In Kitty before 0.26.2, insufficient validation in the desktop no ...
CVE-2022-41322.summary: In Kitty before 0.26.2, insufficient validation in the desktop notification escape sequence can lead to arbitrary code execution. The user must display attacker-controlled content in the terminal, then click on a notification popup.

CVE-2025-43929.summary: open_actions.py in kitty before 0.41.0 does not ask for user confirmation before running a local executable file that may have been linked from an untrusted document (e.g., a document opened in KDE ghostwriter).
